name: Chicken Breasts in Herb and Yogurt Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Remove skin from chicken breasts.
3. Grease a roasting pan and place the chicken breasts in it.
4. Combine all other ingredients in a bowl.
5. Baste the chicken breasts with the mixture.
6. Bake for 20 minutes.
7. Remove from oven.
8. Turn the chicken breasts over and baste with the sauce again.
9. Continue baking for an additional 15 minutes, or until the meat is tender.
10. Turn off the oven.
11. Cover the chicken with foil and let it stand in the oven for 10 minutes.
12. Remove the foil and arrange the chicken breasts on a serving dish.
13. Serve hot.
